title: DependencyFetchBatchRequest
description: Lockfile-driven dependency-fetch batch request identity that binds one lockfile snapshot to a canonical set of typed dependency requests.

lockfile_kind.description: Typed lockfile family used to derive this batch request.

lockfile_digest.description: Canonical digest of lockfile bytes that produced this dependency request batch.

request_set_hash.description: Canonical digest over the deterministically ordered typed dependency request set.

dependency_requests.description: Deterministically ordered typed dependency fetch requests derived from the lockfile.

batch_request_id.description: Optional workflow/operator correlation identifier; not part of cache identity.

lockfile_locator_hint.description: Optional non-authoritative lockfile label for operator UX; must never be used as cache identity.
